'''竏嘖-dh-s-r''' ('''kasadhseroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beblur|beblur]] (auto-generated)".

|-
! Root consonants
| s-dh-s-r

| [[Transitive verb]]

| [[Wikt:beblur|beblur]] (auto-generated)

! Citation form
| 竏嘖-dh-s-r
|-
! Lemma
| kasadhseroko
|}
